title: Job Opening Teacher at Aakash Educational Services

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Aakash Educational Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aakash Educational Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Aakash Educational Services:
Aakash Educational Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services!
